title: Tool Mode
description: Choose how tool calls are handled for Codex App Server.

title: Default model ID
description: Model ID to use when a request does not specify one.

title: Codex tools auto-approved
description: Codex tool calls are executed without approval prompts in Jan.

title: Jan tool execution
description: Jan executes MCP/RAG tools and shows approvals.

title: Start shim now
description: Start the local shim immediately. The toggle will reset after starting.

title: Auto-start shim
description: Automatically start the local Codex App Server shim on app launch.

title: Shim Host
description: Host for the local Codex App Server shim.

title: Shim Port
description: Port for the local Codex App Server shim.

title: Codex CLI path (codex)
description: Absolute path to the Codex CLI binary used to run `codex app-server` (required in sandboxed environments).
